allow: Bash(node -e "const { Magister, MagisterSchool } = require\(''magister.js''\); console.log\(typeof Magister\); const m = new Magister\({ school: new MagisterSchool\(''ichthus'', ''https://ichthus.magister.net''\), username: ''test'', password: ''test'' }\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(m\)\).filter\(n => n !== ''constructor''\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''magister.js''\); const M = m.Magister; console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(M.prototype\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''magister.js''\); const magister = m.default; console.log\(''magister fn:'', typeof magister\); const inst = magister\({ school: { url: ''https://ichthus.magister.net'' }, username: ''x'', password: ''y'' }\); console.log\(''returns:'', typeof inst, inst instanceof Promise\)")

Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''magister.js''\); const M = m.Magister; const proto = Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(M.prototype\); console.log\(proto\); const inst = new M\(\); console.log\(typeof inst.grades\)")
